title: Korg
content:
{{CharHub|Korg|Korg}} {{Character |image = Korg - Infobox.jpg |real name = Korg |alias = {{Alias |derivatives = Korgi{{Ref|TLaT}}}} |species = [[Kronan]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|SAK}} (formerly)
{{Citizenship|ASG3}} |gender = Male |snapped = No{{Ref|AE}} |affiliation = [[Sakaaran Rebellion]] (formerly) |movie = ''[[Thor: Ragnarok]]''
''[[Avengers: Endgame]]''
''[[Thor: Love and Thunder]]'' |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'' (archive audio)
''[[Ms. Marvel (TV series)|Ms. Marvel]]'' (depiction)
''[[Secret Invasion (TV series)|Secret Invasion]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |book = ''[[Avengers: Infinity War: The Heroes' Journey]]'' |actor = [[Taika Waititi]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Over here. This pile of rocks waving at you. I’m actually a thing. I'm a being. Allow me to introduce myself. My name is Korg. I’m kind of like the leader in here. I’m made of rocks, as you can see, but don't let that intimidate you. You don’t need to be afraid unless you're made of scissors! Just a little {{WPS|Rock, Paper, Scissors}} joke for you.|Korg to [[Thor]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} '''Korg''' is a [[Kronan]] warrior who was imprisoned on [[Sakaar]] and was forced to participate in the [[Grandmaster]]'s [[Contest of Champions]] alongside his friend [[Miek]]. Upon meeting [[Thor]], Korg helped him and [[Bruce Banner]] [[Sakaaran Revolution|escape]] from Sakaar with help from [[Valkyrie]]. Sparking a [[Sakaaran Rebellion|rebellion]], he led the former prisoners of Sakaar, along with Loki, on a trip to [[Asgard]], where they provided [[Battle for Asgard|reinforcements]] and fought the [[Berserkers]]. As [[Ragnarök]] was unleashed, Korg witnessed the [[Destruction of Asgard|destruction]] of Asgard and stayed with the surviving [[Asgardians]] on their flight towards [[Earth]]. Months later, their [[Statesman|ship]] was [[Attack on the Statesman|attacked]] by [[Thanos]], although Korg escaped. Following the [[Snap]], Korg was one of the survivors and relocated in [[New Asgard]] on Earth with Miek and the rest of the surviving Asgardians. He spent five years keeping Thor company as he descended into a drunken hermit over his failure to stop [[Thanos]]. In [[2023]], Korg joined the [[Battle of Earth|battle]] to defeat an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]], before heading back to New Asgard under Valkyrie's new rule. The following year, he traveled to [[Indigarr]], which he helped [[Battle of Indigarr|defend]] alongside Thor and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. Korg and Thor then returned to New Asgard after they learned it was under attack by [[Gorr the God Butcher]]. When Gorr kidnapped the Asgardian children, Korg traveled with Thor and his allies on their quest to [[Omnipotence City]], where they sought the aid of [[Zeus]]. Korg was nearly killed when Zeus struck him with his [[Thunderbolt]], losing most of his body in the process. After failing to defeat Gorr in the [[Shadow Realm]], Korg stayed behind in New Asgard. As his body fully regenerated, he met another Kronan named [[Dwayne]], with whom he had a son. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Childhood==== Korg was first born when two Kronan men [[O-Korg]] and [[Ahna]] met together inside a cave on [[Ria]] and held hands for a birthing ritual. A month later Korg was born. Later he was given to an adoptive mother who he was raised by.{{Ref|TLaT}}{{Ref|TR}} ===Failed Revolution=== ====Enslaved by the Grandmaster==== {{Quote|I tried to start a revolution but didn't print enough pamphlets, so hardly anyone turned up, except for my mum and her boyfriend, who I hate. As punishment, I was forced to be in here and become a gladiator.|Korg to [[Thor]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} Sometime after he became an adult, Korg was forced to become one of the [[Grandmaster]]'s champions on the planet [[Sakaar]] after his rebellion against him failed when he was unable to collect enough support. The only people that turned up were his mother and her boyfriend, whom he hated. He reflects on this later in his life, joking that he "didn't print enough pamphlets." Korg met and became friends with another gladiator, [[Miek]].{{Ref|TR}} ===Meeting Thor=== ====Explaining the Contest==== [[File:Thor-Ragnarok-Korg-introduces-himself.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Miek]] introduce themselves to [[Thor]]]] {{Quote|Wait. You’re not gonna face [[Hulk|him]], are you?"
"Yes, I am. I'm gonna [[Duel in the Grand Arena|fight him]], win, and get the hell off this [[Sakaar|planet]]!"
"That's exactly what [[Doug (Gladiator)|Doug]] used to say! See you later, New Doug!|Korg and [[Thor]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} In [[2017]], Korg encountered [[Thor]] after he was thrown into the gladiator's quarters. He struck up a conversation with him, introducing himself and his friend [[Miek]] to him and insisting that Thor not be intimidated by his appearance. Once Korg had confirmed to Thor that he was indeed a [[Kronan]], Korg then explained how he had first gotten to [[Sakaar]] following his own failed revolution. [[File:KorgMeetingThor.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg explaining their new situation to [[Thor]]]] As Thor had attempted to explore their cell, he discovered that it was a magic circle which Korg described as a freaky circle. Thor and Korg then discussed the [[Grandmaster]]'s champion, with Korg telling him that everyone who fought against the champion inside the arena had died, showing him the corpse of [[Doug (Gladiator)|Doug]], the last person who faced the champion. He then called Thor "New Doug" after Thor announced that he would be challenging the champion and intended to win. [[File:KorgMiekThor-PissOffGhost.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg attempts to tell [[Loki]]'s illusion to piss off]] When [[Loki]] visited Thor using his illusion powers in order to try and convince his adopted brother not to challenge the Grandmaster's champion and consider escaping while [[Hela]] took over [[Asgard]], Korg stayed close by but did not interfere. Just as Loki's illusion left the room, Korg took the chance and attempted to attack him, yelling at Loki to piss off and calling him a ghost, while Miek had also charged forward to assist his friend in the possible battle against Loki.{{Ref|TR}} ====Thor vs. Hulk==== [[File:Thor-Ragnarok-Korg-holding-a-wooden-fork.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg chooses his weapons for his battles]] {{Quote|Ah, yuck, there's still someone's hair and blood all over this. Guys, can you clean up the weapons once you've finished your fight? Disgusting slobs.|Korg|Thor: Ragnarok}} Prior to [[Thor]]'s battle against [[Hulk]], Korg complained to his fellow champions about the state of the communal weapons, asking them to clean them after use having found some hair and blood from the previous [[Contest of Champions]] battles over some of the weapons. Seeing that Thor was struggling to choose a weapon to use, Korg then offered him a three-pronged spear which he turned down, hoping instead to find a new hammer that he could use in his battle. [[File:KorgDiscussingValkyrie-TR.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Thor]] discussing [[Valkyrie]]'s history]] Thor then told Korg all about [[Mjølnir]] and its abilities to summon up lightning and return to his hand whenever he called it. Thor and Korg then discussed [[Valkyrie|Scrapper 142]], with Korg revealing that she was in fact [[Asgardian]] as well as a former member of the [[Valkyrie (Team)|Valkyrie]], much to Thor's surprise as he attempted to convince her to help him escape [[Sakaar]], although she refused. [[File:Korgwatching.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg watches the [[Duel in the Grand Arena]]]] During Thor's duel with [[Hulk]], Korg commented on his apparent foolishness, staying in the wings alongside [[Miek]] and all of the other fighters as the fight had gone ahead. However, when Thor gained the upper hand, Korg encouraged the other gladiators to participate in the chant supporting Thor. Eventually, however, the [[Grandmaster]] cheated and used the [[Obedience Disk]] to knock Thor to the ground and allow Hulk to win, prompting Korg to reminisce about Doug's fight.{{Ref|TR}} ====[[Sakaaran Revolution]]==== [[File:REV1000.1050-1.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Miek]] passing all the time together]] {{Quote|The [[Thor|Lord of Thunder]] sends his best."
"The revolution has begun!|[[Valkyrie]] and Korg|Thor: Ragnarok}} During [[Thor]]'s attempt to escape from [[Sakaar]], Korg remained locked inside of his cell with [[Miek]] to keep him company while they remained as prisoners of the [[Grandmaster]], with Korg questioning if the liquid that Miek was dropping from his body were in fact his eggs which he suspected. While Korg remained in waiting, Thor sent [[Valkyrie]] to deactivate the [[Obedience Disk]]s on Korg and the other prisoners, finally giving them freedom. [[File:Rebellion.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg joins up with the [[Sakaaran Rebellion]]]] Around the gladiator quarters, the disks fell off them to Korg's delight before Valkyrie burst into their room and asked to know who Korg was out of the other [[Contest of Champions]] challengers. Korg himself then awkwardly questioned who it was who was asking before noting that he knew only Valkyrie was asking him and questioning if she was asking on behalf of anybody else. Valkyrie had then noted that Thor had sent her before Korg was then provided with Sakaaran weaponry by Valkyrie, Korg led the [[Sakaaran Rebellion|slave revolt]] against the Grandmaster. [[File:SRFTR.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg prepares to finally escape from [[Sakaar]]]] Korg then recruited [[Tasba]] and [[Biff (Rebellion)|Biff]] into the rebellion, quickly gaining their freedom while Thor was able to make his escape. During the revolt, Korg and his companions broke into the hangar bay to escape the planet, leading Korg to find a [[Obedience Disk]] trigger, which he then switched off, releasing [[Loki]], who they offered a way off the planet. The group then stole a large ship and escaped [[Sakaar]], flying through the [[Devil's Anus]] towards [[Asgard]] in order to assist Thor.{{Ref|TR}} ====[[Battle for Asgard]]==== [[File:Korg in Asgard Earth-199999.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg saving [[Heimdall]] from the [[Berserkers]]]] {{Quote|The damage is not too bad. As long as the foundations are still strong, we can rebuild this [[Asgard|place]]. It will become a haven for all peoples and aliens of the universe. Oof. Now those foundations are gone. Sorry.|Korg to the [[Asgardians]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} While [[Loki]] piloted the ''[[Statesman]]'' towards the [[Bifrost Bridge]], Korg got off early and managed to save [[Heimdall]]'s life when he had been pinned down by the [[Berserkers]]. Korg then introduced himself and [[Miek]] to Heimdall before pointing him in the direction of the ''Statesman'', inviting Heimdall and the other [[Asgardians]] to make their hasty escape from [[Asgard]] just before they could all be wiped out. [[File:Thor Ragnarok-KorgGunsDownBerserkers.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg battles against the army of [[Berserkers]]]] Korg and his fellow [[Contest of Champions]] gladiators then proceeded to help all of the remaining Asgardians to evacuate the planet before it was too late by climbing on board the ''Statesman'', with Korg using his [[Sakaar]]an Blaster to shoot down all of the attacking Berserkers which had been sent to stop them by [[Hela]]. Fighting alongside Loki, Heimdall and Miek to ensure the safety of the Asgardians, Korg and his new allies eventually found themselves overwhelmed. [[File:Korg-ThorsLightning.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg witnesses [[Thor]] at his full power]] Faced with the onslaught of Berserkers, Korg held them off for as long as he could, before witnessing a massive lightning blast destroy much of the [[Royal Palace of Valaskjalf]]. Much to the surprise of Korg, out of the lightning came [[Thor]], who charged through the Berserkers army and aided his allies, all while the [[Hulk]] dealt with [[Fenris]], giving Korg and the others a clear advantage. During their battle, however, Korg had inadvertently stepped on and seemingly killed Miek. [[File:1040946-korg.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Miek]] watch [[Surtur]] destroy Asgard]] Feeling great guilt over killing Miek, Korg picked him up and took him on board the ''Statesman'' as they were evacuated. Having successfully evacuated all the surviving Asgardians, Korg watched as [[Surtur]] then destroyed Asgard by finally causing [[Ragnarök]]. Korg commented on how the Asgardians could rebuild the planet, only to witness the utter destruction of the world. Shocked, Korg commented that Asgard was well and truly destroyed, apologizing for his previous comment.{{Ref|TR}} ====Joining the Asgardians==== [[File:Thor Ragnarok-ThorSittingintheThrone.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg watches [[Thor]] named as King of [[Asgard]]]] {{Quote|[[Miek]]’s dead. Yeah, I accidentally stomped on him on the [[Rainbow Bridge|bridge]]. I just felt so guilty I've been carrying him around all day. Oh, Miek, you're alive! He's alive, guys. What was your question again?|Korg to [[Thor]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} Following the [[Battle for Asgard]], Korg found a young [[Asgardian]] girl and told her about the ''[[Statesman]]'', saying that it belonged to the [[Grandmaster]].{{Ref|AIWTHJ}} He then stood on board the Statesman alongside all of the remaining Asgardians and his new allies while [[Thor]] was named as their new King of [[Asgard]]. As Thor was asked by [[Heimdall]] where they should go next following the complete and utter [[Ragnarök|destruction]] of their beloved homeworld, Thor was quietly musing where to go onto, before he asked where [[Miek]]'s homeworld was, considering this to be a good destination to aim for. [[File:Miek Revived.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg realizes that [[Miek]] is not actually dead]] Korg admitted that Miek was dead because he had stepped on him while still on the [[Rainbow Bridge]], and that he had been carrying him around because he felt guilty about killing his dear friend. However, Miek then regained consciousness, much to Korg's relief as he then announced to everybody that Miek was indeed alive. Apologizing to Thor and inviting him to speak again, Korg and everybody else were informed that their next destination would, in fact, be [[Earth]].{{Ref|TR}} ====[[Attack on the Statesman|Attack on the ''Statesman'']]==== In [[2018]], the [[Asgardians]] were ambushed by [[Thanos]] and the [[Black Order]]. During this ambush, half of the Asgardians on the ship were slaughtered, including [[Heimdall]] and [[Loki]]. Korg was one of the many survivors from Thanos' attack who took part in leading the remaining Asgardians to safety in escape pods alongside [[Valkyrie]] and [[Miek]], before Thanos destroyed the ship and killed the remaining forces inside the ''[[Statesman]]''.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Snap]]==== Hours later, Korg survived the [[Snap]], alongside [[Miek]] and [[Valkyrie]].{{Ref|AIW}} ===Life on Earth=== ====Settling in New Asgard==== Three weeks later, Korg, [[Miek]], and the surviving [[Asgardians]] arrived on [[Earth]], settling in [[New Asgard]], [[Norway]]. They were then reunited with [[Thor]]. In the five years that followed, Korg played video games with Thor and Miek at Thor's [[Thor's Hut|house]] while he kept him company as Thor descended into depression.{{Ref|AE}} ====Visit==== [[File:Korg-Meik-PlayingFortnite.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Miek]] playing a game of ''{{WPS|Fortnite}}'']] {{Quote|Hey, boys!"
"Hey, guys, long time no see."
"Beer's on the bucket. Feel free to log on to the Wi-Fi. No password, obviously.|Korg and [[Bruce Banner]]|Avengers: Endgame}} In [[2023]], while playing ''[[Fortnite]]'', Korg greeted [[Bruce Banner]] and [[Rocket]] upon seeing them enter the [[Thor's Hut|house]]. Korg then invited Banner and Rocket to drink their beer and use their free wi-fi. However, a player on {{WPS|Playstation Network}}, [[NoobMaster69]], insulted Korg by calling him a name, causing him to inform Thor, who threatened the player and promised to hurt him if he continued with the insults, much to Korg's gratitude. When Banner mentioned [[Thanos]]' name at the moment to Thor, Korg sat up and told Banner that they did not want to say that name on behalf of Thor's defense.{{Ref|AE}} ====[[Battle of Earth]]==== [[File:Korg gets hit by the ship's blasts.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg partaking in the [[Battle of Earth|battle]] against an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]]]] Following the [[Blip]], Korg, along with [[Miek]], [[Valkyrie]], and the [[Einherjar]], was transported by the [[Masters of the Mystic Arts]] via an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] to the ruins of the [[Avengers Compound]] to assist in the [[Battle of Earth|battle]] against an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]] and his army. During the battle, Korg fought [[Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian]], but Obsidian was able to overpower and restrain him until [[Drax the Destroyer]] leaped onto Obsidian's back and started stabbing him with his [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|knives]], which caused him to release Korg, who then promptly knocked him back. Later in the battle, Korg was forced to take cover when the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' fired airstrikes on the battlefield.{{Ref|AE}} During the battle, Korg left trace elements of his DNA on the battlefield, which was collected by [[Nick Fury]]'s secret [[Skrull]] unit and placed into a vial known as the [[Harvest]] alongside other enhanced DNA samples. The Harvest vial was later administered by Super-Skrulls [[Gravik]] and [[G'iah]], granting them access to Korg's physiology and abilities.{{Ref|SI105}}{{Ref|SI106}} Following the battle's conclusion, Korg returned to [[New Asgard]].{{Ref|AE}} ===[[Battle of Indigarr]]=== [[File:Korg tells a story.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg tells the story of [[Thor]] to the [[Indigarrians]]]] Sometime later, Korg left [[New Asgard]] to accompany [[Thor]] and helped the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] on a trip to [[Indigarr]]. There, he told a group of native [[Indigarrians]] about Thor's recent adventures, his training, his deceased [[Warriors Three|friends]], and his past love life, mentioning that Thor would always spring back into action if someone asked him to. Shortly after, he aided the Guardians in fighting off [[Habooska the Horrible]] and his army. [[File:Thor Odinson and Korg.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Thor]] welcome [[Toothgrinder]] and [[Toothgnasher]]]] Korg then stood by with the Guardians and watched as Thor single handledly defeated the army and killed Habooksa with [[Stormbreaker]], although destroying King [[Yakan]]’s palace in the process. Despite this, Thor received two giant goats named [[Toothgrinder]] and [[Toothgnasher]] as gifts, and Korg mentioned that the goats screamed a lot, bringing them up inside the ''[[Benatar]]'' with the Guardians. [[File:Korg.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg sees the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]’s call system]] As the goats caused chaos within the ''Benatar'', Korg was accidentally shot by [[Nebula]], as she wanted to kill the goats for the chaos they made. Korg talked to Thor about making a special whistle for goats, being helped by [[Mantis]], in order to control them. The Guardians then received countless distress calls for help from dead gods, scaring Korg upon seeing the corpses. [[File:Korg and Thor.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Thor]] prepare for their rescue mission]] Korg watched as [[Peter Quill]] played back a distress call on Thor's request which showed Thor's friend [[Sif]] calling for him and stating that [[Gorr the God Butcher]] was after the gods. Following this, Thor decided to split up so he could tend to Sif and not hold the Guardians up. Korg agreed to stay with Thor and watched as the Guardians left. Korg was then shocked to see how Thor summoned Stormbreaker, which was out of control, and Korg traveled with Thor and the two goats through the [[Bifrost Bridge]] to help Sif.{{Ref|TLaT}} ===[[Gorr's Vow Against Gods]]=== ====Seeing Falligar==== [[File:Thor L&T Trailer 39.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg sees [[Falligar the Behemoth|Falligar]]'s corpse]] Korg and [[Thor]] went to [[Falligar]] and immediately saw the giant [[Falligar the Behemoth]]. Korg asked who it was, and Thor replied saying he was the nicest god you could ever meet. However, Falligar was killed. Thor then saw [[Sif]] and flew to her. Sif was dying, but said that [[Gorr the God Butcher]]'s next stop was [[New Asgard]]. Thor then quickly brought everyone there.{{Ref|TLaT}} ====[[Attack on New Asgard]]==== [[File:Thor and Korg.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg and [[Thor]] discuss [[Jane Foster]]]] Arriving on [[New Asgard]], Thor told the medics to get [[Sif]] to the infimary. They then fought [[Gorr the God Butcher]]'s incoming [[Shadow Monsters]]. Korg witnessed Thor reunite with [[Jane Foster]], who was now a Thor with [[Mjølnir]]. They fought the shadow monsters, but lost as Gorr took New Asgard's children with him and left. The people of New Asgard gathered at town hall to discuss a plan. Although, everyone was upset at what happened. As everyone talked, Korg talked to Thor about {{WPS|Jodie Foster}}. Thor corrected him saying it was Jane. Thor then tried to summon Mjølnir, but [[Stormbreaker]] came over to him instead. Thor gave a speech before setting off the find the kids. However, an angry Stormbreaker prohibited that, crashing Thor into a sculpture. Thor returned and Korg told him his cape was on fire. Suddenly, [[Axl Heimdallson]] emerged in the air as he had his [[Heimdall|father]]'s powers. He told Thor where they were, the [[Shadow Realm]]. Thor called him Astrid, but Axl corrected him saying what his new name was, but Thor did not believe it. Korg stuck up for Axl, thinking his new name was "asshole." The group then set off to [[Omnipotence City]] to get some gods to help.{{Ref|TLaT}} ====Trip to Omnipotence City==== [[File:Thor, Mighty Thor, Valkyrie & Korg.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg in [[Omnipotence City]]]] {{Quote|Who's talking?”
“[[Thor|These]] [[Valkyrie|gu]][[Mighty Thor|ys]].”
“Korg, shut up.|[[Zeus]], Korg and [[Thor]]|Thor: Love and Thunder}} Korg joined [[Thor]], [[Mighty Thor]] and [[Valkyrie]] on their journey to [[Omnipotence City]] in hopes of recruiting any gods to aid the fight against [[Gorr the God Butcher]]. The group put on robes, disguising themselves as gods of emotion. During the visit, countless gods were seen, including [[Ninny of the Nonny]], whom Korg worshipped. They then sat down and listened to [[Zeus]], who welcomed everyone, being very show offish. [[File:Korg, Valkyrie & Jane Foster.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg reveals that his friends were talking]] When plotting on how to get the [[Thunderbolt]], Zeus overheard somebody talking, which led to Korg directly calling out his own friends. When Thor was brought forth to Zeus, the three had to watch as Thor was chained down and stripped naked, forcing Korg, Foster and Valkyrie to take off their own disguises, revealing them as Asgardians. After Thor got his robe back on, Korg aided his friends to battle Zeus and his [[Spartans|Spartan guards]]. [[File:Korg almost died.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg begins to crumble due to [[Thunderbolt]]'s attack]] They fought the guards, with Korg easily shooting and smashing them with his hammer. He then told Valkyrie to watch out as he threw the hammer passed her. He then threw it to Thor, who smashed a guard with it. Zeus had enough as he took Thunderbolt and threw it at Korg. This struck Korg in the chest. Korg tried walking towards Thor, but quickly crumpled into rocks. [[File:Korg on head.png|{{AltFloat}}|Korg guides [[Valkyrie]] during their fight]] Luckily, the only alive part of a [[Kronan]] was the face, so Korg lived. Korg was consoled by a worried Thor before he was taken by Valkyrie, who tied Korg to the back of her head. Korg told Valkyrie when enemies were coming up from behind so she could fight them. He then tried to whistle to the goats, but failed once again. He reminded himself to purse his lips, which emitted a elegant whistle that called the goats and [[Asgardian Skiff]], leaving [[Omnipotence City]].{{Ref|TLaT}} ====Trip to the Shadow Realm==== {{Quote|Hey. We're here."
"Where did all the color go?|[[Valkyrie]] and Korg|Thor: Love and Thunder}} Now just a head, Korg talked to [[Valkyrie]] on the [[Asgardian Skiff]] while they made their way to the [[Moon of Shame]]. He sang a song from his childhood, highlighting how his species made babies and how his two fathers made him. He then talked to Valkyrie about her past with the [[Valkyrie (Team)|Valkyrie]]. He then asked what she thought [[Thor]] and [[Mighty Thor]] were talking about outside, but Valkyrie claimed they were not talking. Suddenly, they crashed into the moon. Thor, Foster, and Valkyrie fought [[Gorr the God Butcher]]. The goats then took Korg over to them where Thor summoned the [[Bifrost Bridge]]. However, Gorr was able to grab [[Stormbreaker]] which he could use to get his wish. Thor returned later, having defeated Gorr, but losing Foster in the progress. Life returned to normal as Korg witnessed the aftermath and then left [[New Asgard]].{{Ref|TLaT}} ===Return to Ria=== ====Relationship with Dwayne==== Following [[Gorr the God Butcher]]'s threat, Korg regained his body and returned to his home planet of [[Ria]]. There, he met a [[Kronan]] named [[Dwayne]], whom he fell in love with. They soon went to a lava pit and submerged themselves in lava, which gave them a baby boy.{{Ref|TLaT}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|You're made from rock."
"Perishable rock!|[[Thor]] and Korg|Thor: Ragnarok}} *'''Kronan Physiology''': Kronans are an ancient race of rock-like four-fingered humanoid beings with superhuman physical abilities. When Korg is idle, he grows moss on his exterior which happened due to his laziness in the five years following the [[Snap]]. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Korg possesses immense superhuman strength. He was able to take down several [[Berserkers]] and knock back [[Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian]], the strongest of the [[Black Order/Cosmic Time Heist|Black Order]], using his [[Sakaaran Laser Rifles|Sakaaran laser rifle]]. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Korg's rock-like body is incredibly durable. He was able to withstand an energy blast from [[Nebula]]'s gun without much harm. However, he is still vulnerable to blows from [[Hulk]], attacks by [[Zeus]] or from an opponent wielding [[Mjølnir]]. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': Korg is able to fight in battles without getting tired very easily. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Combatant''': [[File:Korg & Drax.png|thumb|250px|Korg fighting against [[Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian]]]] Korg is a proficient combatant, being a veteran of the [[Grandmaster]]'s [[Contest of Champions]], surviving many gladiatorial matches. He was also able to knock back [[Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian]] for a time being and survived an onslaught of [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]]' soldiers during the [[Battle of Earth]]. *'''Staff Mastery''': ''To be added'' *'''Expert Marksman''': Korg is exceptionally skilled in the use of firearms, being able to take down dozens of [[Berserkers]] with his [[Sakaaran Laser Rifles|rifle]] during the [[Battle for Asgard]]. He then kept this weapon and used it in the [[Battle of Earth]]. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Quote|Wanna use a big wooden fork?"
"No."
"Yeah, not really useful unless you're fighting off three [[vampires]] that were huddled together.|Korg and [[Thor]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} *'''[[Sakaaran Laser Rifles|Sakaaran Laser Rifle]]''': [[File:Thor Ragnarok 73.jpg|thumb|250px|Korg shooting at the armies of [[Berserkers]]]] Korg was given a Sakaaran Laser Rifle by [[Valkyrie]] so he could lead a revolution against the [[Grandmaster]] and his [[Sakaaran Guards]] in the [[Grandmaster Palace]]. Korg then took the rifle to [[Asgard]] and used it with proficiency against the [[Berserkers]] during the [[Battle for Asgard]]. He also used this weapon against [[Cull Obsidian]] during the [[Battle of Earth]]. *'''[[Big Wooden Fork]]''': While browsing weapons to be used during his gladiatorial fights, Korg came upon a wooden spear with three edges and suggested to [[Thor]] that he could use it, but they quickly discarded it as being not very helpful. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Obedience Disk]]''': Korg wore an obedience disk that would shock him if he attempted to rebel. [[Valkyrie]] helped Korg to deactivate the Obedience Disks as well as the other gladiators, making him free from getting shocked and start a [[Sakaaran Rebellion]], which provided a distraction for the [[Revengers]]. ===Vehicles=== {{Quote|We're gonna get outta here on that [[Statesman|big spaceship]]. Wanna come?|Korg to [[Loki]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} *'''''[[Statesman]]''''': As it was once formerly owned by the [[Grandmaster]], the ''Statesman'' is a massive spaceship, that was later used by Korg and the [[Sakaaran Rebellion]], in order to escape [[Sakaar]]. *'''''[[Benatar]]''''': ''To be added'' *'''''[[Aegir]]''''': ''To be added'' ==Facilities== *'''[[Grand Arena]]''': Korg was forced to fight in the Grand Arena on [[Sakaar]] by the [[Grandmaster]]. He watched as [[Thor]] fought [[Hulk]] before being defeated by him. *'''[[New Asgard]]''': Korg lived on New Asgard with the rest of the [[Asgardians]] following [[Asgard]]'s [[Destruction of Asgard|destruction]]. He often played video games, including ''[[Fortnite]]'', with [[Thor]] and regularly came into problems with a player who used the name [[NoobMaster69]]. Korg was playing ''Fortnite'' when [[Hulk]] and [[Rocket]] went to get Thor to help undo the effects of [[Thanos]]' [[Snap|decimation]] of half the universe's population. ==Relationships== {{col-begin}}{{col-2}} ===Family=== *Mother *[[O-Korg]] - Attempted Killer {{col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|TR}} **{{Appearance|AIWTHJ}} (flashbacks; concurrent events) *{{Appearance|AE}} *{{Appearance|MM101}} (depiction) *{{Appearance|TLaT}} *{{Appearance|SI106}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|LK106}} (voice) ==Trivia== *In the comics, Korg was part of the [[w:c:marvel:Warbound|Warbound]], together with [[Hulk]], and was headquartered on [[Sakaar]]. Korg first appeared in ''[[w:c:marvel:Journey into Mystery Vol 1 83|Journey into Mystery #83]]'', the first Marvel comic to feature [[Thor]]. *The Hawaiian shirt that was worn by Korg in ''[[Avengers: Endgame]]'' is the same shirt that [[Taika Waititi]] wore for the announcement of ''[[Thor: Ragnarok]]'' at San Diego Comic-Con 2017. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Taika Waititi]] claimed that he based Korg's soft-spoken voice on Polynesian bouncers. ''"We wanted to change the idea of what a hulking guy made of rocks could be. He's huge and heavy, but with a light soul. We wanted to make him funny and a relatable entry point into this world. And [[Thor]] needs friends"''.[http://ew.com/movies/2017/04/18/thor-ragnarok-director-taika-waititi-korg/ Thor: Ragnarok director Taika Waititi to portray Korg in film][http://comicbook.com/marvel/2017/07/23/thor-ragnarok-director-confirms-korg/ Thor: Ragnarok Director Confirms Korg] *At one point, [[Kevin Feige]] and Taika Waititi talked about potentially doing a [[Marvel One-Shots|One-Shot]] short film featuring Korg and [[Miek]].[https://www.fandango.com/movie-news/marvel-has-big-plans-for-korg-and-miek-from-thor-ragnarok-752739 MARVEL HAS BIG PLANS FOR KORG AND MIEK FROM ‘THOR: RAGNAROK’] *Korg appeared alongside [[Deadpool]] in a YouTube video on [[Ryan Reynolds (actor)|Ryan Reynolds]]' channel, promoting Reynolds and Taika Waititi's film ''{{WPS|Free Guy}}'', in which they watch and react to the film's trailer. Korg was portrayed by [[Aaron W. Reed]].[https://youtu.be/g7q60i_Lh_E/ Deadpool and Korg React][https://www.instagram.com/p/CRSL_BqrVNv/?img_index=1 Aaron W. Reed on Instagram - July 13, 2021] ==References== {{Gallery|Korg/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Korg (comics)|Korg}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/korg}} [[es:Korg]] [[ru:Корг]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Thor: Ragnarok Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Endgame Characters]] [[Category:Thor: Love and Thunder Characters]] [[Category:Book Characters]] [[Category:Kronans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:No Hair]] [[Category:Green Eyes]] [[Category:Contest of Champions Challengers]] [[Category:Sakaaran Rebellion Members]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]] [[Category:High Body Count]]
